This PR adds optimization for BF16 GEMMs with small oc shapes ( oc < 16), including:

weight_packed_linear， which is common for all GEMMs with oc < 16
fused_linear_sigmoid_mul, which is specific for cases found in Qwen3-next (shared_expert_gate, where N = 1 and having post op sigmoid+mul)

vllm.title: Use Transformers v5 RoPE standardisation and validation
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In Transformers v5, PreTrainedConfig inherits RotaryEmbeddingConfigMixin, which contains standardisation and validation methods for RoPE.
These methods are not called automatically on init, so it is up to the modelling code to call these methods. Custom models written for Transformers v4 do not know

This PR adds Llama4 Maverick FP8 to AMD CI, and also refactors lm eval to support RTOL, env vars, and flags
Test Plan
AMD CI: https://buildkite.com/vllm/amd-ci/builds/1302

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Update batch invariant test trigger
vllm.author: zhewenl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Test trigger for batch invariant test is bit too general with vllm/, so that PRs like #30005 will trigger the test.
This PR narrows the trigger to vllm/v1/attention  + vllm/model_executor/layers
Test Plan
CI

vllm.title: [CI] fix silent error in nightly wheel index generation script, add generation time to HTML index
vllm.author: Harry-Chen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
#30008 introduced a silent error when generating nightly wheel indices. $PYTHON pip install regex && .buildkite/scripts/generate-nightly-index.py --version "$SUBPATH" --current-objects "$obj_json" --output-dir "$INDICES_OUTPUT_DIR" $alias_arg is wrong because: (1) it should be $PYTHON -m pip

vllm.title: [Model] Add Holo2 reasoning parser
vllm.author: hdlj-h
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR adds holo2 reasoning parser for Holo2 models in vLLM, which use <think>...</think> tags and default to enabling reasoning unlike DeepSeek V3.
The parser delegates to the appropriate underlying parser based on chat_template_kwargs:

DeepSeekR1ReasoningParser when reasoning (thinking=T

vllm.title: [PCP&DCP] move CUDAGraph check for PCP&DCP to the check func of platforms
vllm.author: pisceskkk
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since NPU already provides FullGraph support for both PCP and DCP, I believe we should relocate the graph support determination logic from the generic code to platform-specific judgment functions.
Currently, CUDA only supports PIECEWISE mode, but it's unclear whether ROCM behaves consistently with C

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Add jiwer dependency for testing
vllm.author: charlifu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
To fix OpenAI API Correctness test group.
The jiwer package is missing in the test image.
pytest -s entrypoints/openai/correctness/
========== 2 passed, 10 warnings in 110.94s (0:01:50) ===========

vllm.title: Do not guard during noop elimination pass
vllm.author: laithsakka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
VLLM should never guard on SymInts, hence comparing SymInts in custom passes should always use statically_known_true.
Partially address #25623

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Increase the memory threshold for test_deep_sleep_fp8_kvcache
vllm.author: charlifu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Rocm fails on this unit test, because of the memory usage for CudaGraph of model Qwen/Qwen2-0.5B is higher than Nvidia, i.e., 2.79GB vs 0.75GB.
So this PR uses higher memory threshold that fails this unit test for ROCm.
pytest -sv basic_correctness/test_cumem.py
====== 8 passed, 5 warnings in 74.20s

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Correct num_q_heads on DCP for Flashinfer backends
vllm.author: gjc0824
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix num_q_heads on DCP for Flashinfer backends
In current DCP code for Flashinfer, the num_qo_heads is repeatedly multiplied by dcp_world_size.
Test Result
Although it does not affect the precision of inference, sometimes it causes share memory issues. After fixing this bug, the issue can be

vllm.title: Refactor example prompts fixture
vllm.author: nwaughachukwuma
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
I'm taking on the task of improving conftest.py, focusing on type definitions and general code & fixtures improvements, with the objective of creating a better overall testing experience from the perspectives of readability/approachability and test completion time.
This PR focuses on two thi

vllm.title: [AMD][CI] Add ray[default] Dependency On ROCm To Pass v1/metrics/test_engine_logger_apis.py
vllm.author: micah-wil
vllm.bodyExcerpt: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/24267/files introduced from ray import serve as ray_serve into ‎vllm/v1/metrics/ray_wrappers.py, which causes v1/metrics/test_engine_logger_apis.py to fail on ROCm since the aforementioned import fails.
